THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHMAD, AMAL HUSSEIN, ELSIE HUSSEIN, SAMIA HUSSEIN, AYMAN HUSSEIN, EYAD KARAJEH, LAILA HUSSEIN, HASAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUSSEIN, SAHAR (A.K.A. SAHA HUSSEIN) SEE SCANNED DOC - THE COURT HAVING CONSIDERED AND APPROVED THE FINAL REPORT OF THE REFEREE IN PARTITION IN THIS MATTER, AND CONSIDERING THAT THE PROPERTY PARTITIONED HEREIN, NAMELY 1978 42ND AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, HAS BEE PARTITIONED BY SALE AND THAT ALL OF THE PROCEEDS OF SAID SALE HAVE BEEN DISTRIBUTED IN CONFORMITY WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER OF DISTRIBUTION ENTERED DECEMBER 14, 2020, AND THE REFEREE HAVING COMPLETED ALL OF HIS DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES, THE COURT ORDERS AS FOLLOWS: (1) THE FINAL REPORT OF THE REFEREE IS HEREBY APPROVED, AND THE REFEREE IS DISCHARGED; AND (2) THE COURT HEREBY ENTERS ITS FINAL JUDGMENT OF PARTITION IN THIS MATTER.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Sale Of The Real Property, And For Entry Of Final Judgment.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a Progress Report on the Sale of Real Property, and for Entry of Final Judgment.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286. Email: lforster@ssftc.org.

Nicole C. Kelly, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Amal Ahmad, Elsie Hussein, Samia Hussein, Ayman Hussein, Eyad Hussein, Laila Karajeh and Hasan Hasan, who were not present.
Court Appointed Partition Referee, Michael S. Pecherer, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein.

Interlocutory Default Judgment of Partition was signed by the Court on September 22, 2020.
Final Report or the Partition Referee and Confirmation of the Blocked Account was filed April 5, 2021.
Progress Report on the Sale of Real Property was filed with the Clerk's Office on April 30, 2021.

Good cause appearing, the Court APPROVES the Final Report of the Referee in Partition in the matter, and considering that the property in question, located at 1978-42nd Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94122, has been partitioned by sale, and that all of the proceeds of the sale have been distributed in accordance with the percentages enumerated in paragraph 2 of the Court's Interlocutory Default Judgment of Partition, the Court RULES as follows:

(1) The Final Report of the Referee is hereby approved and the Referee is DISCHARGED; and
(2) The Court hereby enters its Final Judgment of Partition in this matter.

Proposed Final Judgment of Partition and Discharge of the Referee, and Revised Order to Deposit Funds into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Default Judgment At Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Nicole C. Kelly, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Amal Ahmad, Eyad Hussein and Samia Hussein, and Elsie Hussein, and for plaintiffs Ayman Hussein, Laila Karajeh and Hasan Hussein, who were not present.
Plaintiffs Amal Ahad, Eyad Hussien and Samia Hussein, appearing for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall, were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Shara Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein.
Plaintiffs' Complaint to Quiet Title, for Partition and Breach of Contract was filed on October 16, 2019.
Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were personally served on defendant Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein, on January 8, 2020.
Default as to defendant Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein, was entered on February 26, 2020.
DOE defendants have not been dismissed.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Amal Ahmad, Elsie Hussein, Samia Hussein, Ayman Hussein, Eyad Hussein, Laila Karajeh and Hasan Hussein, and against the defaulted defendant Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein, as follows:

(1) Plaintiffs Amal Ahmad, Elsie Hussein, Samia Hussein, Ayman Hussein, Eyad Hussein, Laila Karajeh and Hasan Hussein are owners in fee simple of the real property commonly known as 1978-42nd Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116;
(2) That plaintffs' individual interest in the real property commonly known as 1978-42nd Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116 is
(a) Ayman Hussein - 18.1818182 (two-elevenths interest)
(b) Eyad Hussein - 18.1818182 (two-elevenths interest)
(c) Hasan Hussein - 18.1818182 (two-elevenths interest)
(d) Laila Karaja - 9.09090909 (one-eleventh interest)
(e) Amal Ahmad - 9.09090909 (one-eleventh interest)
(f) Sahar Hussein, a/k/a Saha Hussein - 9.09090909 (one-eleventh interest)
(g) Elsie Hussein - 9.09090909 (one-eleventh interest)
(h) Samia Hussein - 9.09090909 (one-eleventh interest);
(3) Sale of the real property and division of the net proceeds of sale is more equitable than division of the real property in kind;
(4) The real property shall be sold;
(5) Zara Rowbotham of Vanguard Properties is appointed Referee with the authority to sell the real property to the highest bidder;
(6) The Referee's commission is six percent of the total sale; and
(7) Expenditures to prepare the real property for sale shall not exceed $25,000.00;

Matter is CONTINUED to February 18, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Sale of the Real Property, and for Entry of Final Judgment.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Interlocutory Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
